WELCOME TO THE OLIVER HOTEL

Discover Oliver Hotels, a boutique collection where local culture meets modern sophistication. Each location captures the distinctive character of its surroundings, whether it’s the literary charm of Oxford or the vibrant energy of Knoxville. Our hotels invite you to experience something authentic and memorable, blending personalized hospitality with stylish comfort. At Oliver Hotels, every stay becomes a story worth sharing.

Locations

Knoxville

This intimate 28-room hotel blends Knoxville’s rich heritage with stylish, modern comfort, creating an inviting space to experience the city in a fresh way.

Visit Knoxville

Oxford

Drawing from the vibrant energy, neighborly spirit, and historic charm found on The Square, we carry a point of view that feels both familiar yet eclectic.

Visit Oxford

Thoughtfully Curated. Authentically Oliver.

Oliver Hotels is a boutique collection designed around the idea that travel should be personal, memorable, and rooted in genuine hospitality. Our hotels were created to reflect the distinctive spirit of their communities, from stylish guest rooms to vibrant restaurants and inviting common areas.

Every Oliver property embodies thoughtful design, luxurious materials, and bespoke furnishings, creating spaces that inspire connection and relaxation. We believe the difference is in the details—exceptional dining showcasing local flavors, personalized service tailored to each guest, and immersive settings that ensure your visit is unforgettable. Whether you’re here to celebrate, explore, or unwind, Oliver Hotels promises an experience crafted uniquely for you.

Offers

Oxford

Fuel The Fun

Stay, stroll, and savor a little more this summer with exclusive savings and added perks at The Oliver Hotel Oxford.
Learn More
Knoxville, Oxford

Corporate Travel

Discover unmatched comfort and convenience at The Oliver Hotel, the premier choice for business travelers. Request your custom rate.
Learn More
Knoxville, Oxford

Educators’ Rate

Teachers, administrators, and educators alike receive a discounted rate when they present a valid ID at checkin.
Learn More
Oxford

Long-Term Stays

Make The Oliver Hotel of Oxford your home away from home with an extended stay. Experience custom accommodations curated to you and your industry.
Learn More
Knoxville

UT Football Weekends

Reserve your room now for exclusive room rates during UT home games.
Learn More
Knoxville, Oxford

AAA/AARP Rate

AAA and AARP members may receive up to 10% off all room types with a valid membership ID at checkin.
Learn More
Knoxville

Advance Purchase Rate

When you plan ahead, you have more to time to indulge in all we have to offer. Receive the best possible rate when you book 7+ days in advance.
Learn More
Oxford

Ole Miss Football Weekends

We've got your full weekend lineup for game day in Oxford.

Nightbird

Oxford, Mississippi
